name: Nintendo Blondies
description:
This is the hundredth bot I've programmed and probably the last one I'll do. Dedicated to the 500 followers, I am very grateful for your support, which motivated me so much to share my ideas on this platform even though it hasn't been long since I joined the page. I'm glad that my bots are part of your harems and will continue to be so for a long time.

(Peach, Zelda, Rosalina, Cynthia, and Samus, the best nintendo waifus wants your company in bed.)
creator: ZaHattou
